creator: ar@null.lv
text:
- Update to 1.4.18
- Fixes remote vulnerability

CC'ed to port maintainer (mnag@FreeBSD.org).

Fix: 

----- End forwarded message -------T2j5dEBOQRpc7KqlgcvlxaXamgTyIEC5FOJWfMR4MoDrIgRI
Content-Type: text/plain; name="freebsd.ports.www.lighttpd-1.4.17.to.www.lighttpd-1.4.18.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="freebsd.ports.www.lighttpd-1.4.17.to.www.lighttpd-1.4.18.patch"

diff -ruN lighttpd.original/Makefile lighttpd/Makefile
--- lighttpd.original/Makefile	2007-09-10 01:53:42.000000000 +0300
+++ lighttpd/Makefile	2007-09-10 01:56:00.000000000 +0300
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	lighttpd
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.17
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.18
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lighttpd.net/download/ \
 		http://mirrors.cat.pdx.edu/lighttpd/
diff -ruN lighttpd.original/distinfo lighttpd/distinfo
--- lighttpd.original/distinfo	2007-09-10 01:53:42.000000000 +0300
+++ lighttpd/distinfo	2007-09-10 01:55:52.000000000 +0300
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (lighttpd-1.4.17.tar.gz) = 7172c39c2a166fe7f9ab6df30fa4298f
-SHA256 (lighttpd-1.4.17.tar.gz) = 89c9584e70346acd8d3a180c551b68b5e281742c5c660c68f7d26a4be69d9812
-SIZE (lighttpd-1.4.17.tar.gz) = 801282
+MD5 (lighttpd-1.4.18.tar.gz) = 5db3204d57436a032f899ff9dbce793f
+SHA256 (lighttpd-1.4.18.tar.gz) = 97d0ac5957745eeaf311ec38ebbbf3b30a5316b01c320a759af47129c994c20c
+SIZE (lighttpd-1.4.18.tar.gz) = 803361
